query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=serviceAllowlist (ServiceAllowlistPermissionsSet OR ServiceAllowlistUpdated)
| json "eventName", "operator.email","operator.sourceIp" as EventName, Admin, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventName in ("ServiceAllowlistPermissionsSet", "ServiceAllowlistUpdated")
| where AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"|count as Count by Admin, EventName
| transpose row Admin column EventName as %"ServiceAllowlistPermissionsSet", %"ServiceAllowlistUpdated"
| sort by ServiceAllowlistPermissionsSet, ServiceAllowlistUpdated

sources.dashboardName: Enterprise Audit - Password Policy, MFA, Service AllowList Activities
sources.dashboardDescription: Password Policy, MFA, Service AllowList Activities Dashboard provides detailed information about password policy creation, deletion, and updates. It also provides a high-level view of users that enable and disable multi factor authorization (MFA), service allowlist updates, as well as user and admin activities.
